data.content:
Shipment review — APPROVED.

Change is live on main of both repos:
- knots/main HEAD = d5ecb30
- foolery/main HEAD = 68a3a881

Commit tag coverage on this knot:
- commit:fbfe76f, commit:b8b9759, commit:d5ecb30 (knots)
- commit:foolery-c2756326, commit:foolery-d23064d2, commit:foolery-68a3a881 (foolery)
Every implementation commit is tagged.

Invariants hold in shipped code:
- Lease lifecycle unchanged (lease_ready → lease_active → lease_terminated).
- SQLite WAL / busy_timeout / serialized-writes rules preserved.
- Workflow state machine unchanged — no new transitions.
- Deprecation warnings emit to stderr; return codes unaffected.

CI completed successfully:
- knots d5ecb30: CI, Release, Repo Hygiene, Changesets Version PR all success.
- foolery 68a3a881: CI, Coverage Badge success.

No regressions: knots coverage 95.14% (+0.13% for helpers.rs, -0.01% aggregate vs baseline); foolery test count 2734 (strictly increased from prior 2730).

Final sign-off: contract is shipped. A downstream Knots release cut is needed to distribute the new kno binary to hosts running Foolery; that cut is outside this knot's scope.
